title: Poors Better Rpg+
description: A modpack that makes the game feel like a RPG
body:
A modpack which adds differnt magic origins, it adds seasons, new biomes, new structures, good performance it also has new dungeons, starter kit, and a skill tree
immersive sounds, new bosses, Completely Overhauled World Generation, QoL Features and great performance and best played with friends!

Recommended 4GB of ram
